notes: I also had to change the Windows version of the prefix to WinXP via winecfg or the first-run setup wouldn't install .net 3.5, and the process lingers after quitting the game, requiring manual shutdown.
title: ENSLAVED™: Odyssey to the West™ Premium Edition

notes: Tried previous mentioned tweak. Game does not start up.
title: ENSLAVED™: Odyssey to the West™ Premium Edition

notes: Runs perfectly "out of the box" now with full controller support, perfect graphics and sound! I have a little bit of stuttering when something explodes, but i'm sure it'll be fixed in the near future with Vulkan renderer (and shader cache) ;)
title: ENSLAVED™: Odyssey to the West™ Premium Edition
ENSLAVED™: Odyssey to the West™ Premium Edition

notes: The game runs great now - It used to crash on launch even with Proton 4.2-2!! There is minor graphics issues after a while but nothing too big (some parts of the screen are black or have flickering light - the game is very playable.) Note: Sometimes with steam I have to switch Proton versions or else it is stuck on a preparing to launch app dialog box - sounds like they are trying to fix this but it still happens for me.
title: ENSLAVED™: Odyssey to the West™ Premium Edition

notes: I first tried to run it using Proton 3.16.9 but it wouldn't start at all. I tried changing winecfg to WindowsXP as previous reports advised but it still wouldn't run. I then changed to using Proton 4.2.3 and it started up in the background. I Alt-Tabbed to the game and it worked perfectly! Steam controller works, audio works, graphics are glitch-free at 1920X1080. Only minor issue is having to use Alt-Tab every time I start the game.

notes:
game runs great with proton 4.2-3 aside from a couple small issues another user posted previously. some portions of scenery occasionally goes black but it does not interfere with gameplay. i also had the issue where i had to switch proton versions and back again to 4.2-3 in order for the game to start. 
disabling esync results in a not being able to start, same with forcing wined3d. game runs/plays perfectly other than that and is why i rate it gold and not platinum.

notes: Missing/black textures are fixed by default with Proton 4.11, you don't need to use d9vk anymore but it's probably better to activate it with "PROTON_USE_D9VK=1"
title: ENSLAVED™: Odyssey to the West™ Premium Edition

notes: Played through the game last month with proton 4.2-9 and gave it a silver because of the missing textures and the characterskins for Trip not working. I replayed the affected Areas and can report no more missing textures and the characterskins work as well. No configuration/tweaks whatsoever are needed. Everything works out of the box.
title: ENSLAVED™: Odyssey to the West™ Premium Edition
